rows.label: bf02390100_0020
rows.name:
My triumphant return...to
Superbia... with the Holy Grail...

rows.label: bf02390100_0040
rows.name:
That's what he gets for
trying to execute Nia.

rows.label: bf02390100_0050
rows.name:
No. They were trying to send
me back to the homeland.

rows.label: bf02390100_0070
rows.name:
A trap? So they weren't
actually gonna execute you?

rows.label: bf02390100_0080
rows.name:
Boss, none of that matters!
Hurry and escape!

rows.label: bf02390100_0090
rows.name:
Master is right. Chance of
reinforcements very high.

rows.label: bf02390100_0100
rows.name:
Let us make haste. Getting out
of town would be a good start!
